body.en:
To install Claude Code, you'll need two things already on your computer:

1. **Node.js** — a tool that lets code run on your computer
2. **A terminal** — which you already learned to use!

Don't worry if you don't have Node.js yet. We'll walk through everything.
body.zh:
安装Claude Code之前，你的电脑需要两样东西：

1. **Node.js** —— 让代码在电脑上运行的工具
2. **终端** —— 你已经学会使用了！

如果还没有Node.js也别担心。我们会一步步教你。

body.en: Open your terminal and paste this command. If you see a version number (like v18.0.0), you're good! If not, visit **nodejs.org** and download it.
body.zh: 打开终端粘贴这个命令。如果你看到版本号（如 v18.0.0），就没问题！如果没有，访问 **nodejs.org** 下载安装。

body.en: This one command downloads and installs Claude Code on your computer. Copy it, paste it into your terminal, and press Enter. It might take a minute — that's normal!
body.zh: 这条命令会在你的电脑上下载并安装Claude Code。复制它，粘贴到终端，按回车。可能需要一分钟——这很正常！

body.en: Let's make sure Claude Code installed correctly. We'll run a simple command that asks Claude Code for its version number. If it shows a version, you're all set!
body.zh: 让我们确认Claude Code安装成功了。运行一个简单命令查看版本号。如果显示版本号，就大功告成！

body.en: Type the command below to verify Claude Code is installed.
body.zh: 输入下面的命令来验证Claude Code已安装。

expectedCommands.successMsg: Claude Code is installed! You're ready to go!

title.zh: 第四步：首次运行和认证

body.en:
The first time you run Claude Code, it will ask you to **sign in** with your Anthropic account. Just follow the prompts — it'll open a browser window for you to log in.

Once you're signed in, Claude Code remembers you. You won't need to do this again.
body.zh:
第一次运行Claude Code时，它会要求你用Anthropic账号**登录**。按照提示操作——它会打开浏览器窗口让你登录。

登录后，Claude Code会记住你，以后不需要再次登录。

body.en:
Amazing! You've just:

- Checked your prerequisites
- Installed Claude Code
- Verified it works

In the next lesson, you'll have your **first real conversation** with Claude and watch it build something from scratch. This is where it gets really fun!
body.zh:
太棒了！你刚刚完成了：

- 检查了前置要求
- 安装了Claude Code
- 验证了它能用

下一课你将和Claude进行**第一次真正的对话**，看它从零开始构建。真正好玩的来了！
